title: thalia densibracteata
intro: Thalia densibracteata, also known as the lesser thalia or lesser thalia cattail, is a species of aquatic plant in the family Marantaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Thalia densibracteata are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used as a tea or tincture, or it can be made into a poultice to apply topically for skin conditions and wounds.
